derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting owner acquired 130.0 shares of Deferred Stock Units at $None (Code A). [Note 1: The deferred stock units ("DSUs") represent a quarterly payment of the portion of the reporting person's other fees under the Allison Transmission Holdings, Inc. (the "Company") Fifth Amended and Restated Non-Employee Director Compensation Policy deferred pursuant to the Company's Amended and Restated Non-Employee Director Deferred Compensation Plan. The other fees are payable quarterly in arrears.]

footnotes.1: The deferred stock units ("DSUs") represent a quarterly payment of the portion of the reporting person's other fees under the Allison Transmission Holdings, Inc. (the "Company") Fifth Amended and Restated Non-Employee Director Compensation Policy deferred pursuant to the Company's Amended and Restated Non-Employee Director Deferred Compensation Plan. The other fees are payable quarterly in arrears.
footnotes.2:
Each DSU is the economic equivalent of one share of the Company's common stock. The DSUs become payable, in common stock, or at the Company's election cash, at the earlier of the reporting person's separation from
 service or a change in control. DSUs earn dividend equivalents when dividends are declared on the Company's common stock.
footnotes.3: The number of DSUs received was calculated based on $38.45, which was the closing price of the Company's common stock on the date of grant.
